params.formula:
CONCAT(
        match_id,
        '_',
        RIGHT(CONCAT('000000', CAST(CAST(ts AS INT) AS STRING)), 6),
        '.',
        RIGHT(CONCAT('00', CAST((ts - CAST(ts AS INT)) * 100 AS INT)), 2)
    )
params.name: match_event
